---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new collection capability for ts-collections
title: "[FEATURE] <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem or limitation does this solve for users of ts-collections?

## Proposal

Describe the behavior or API you would like to add or change. Include naming, data shapes, or constraints if relevant.

## Example usage

Show how the proposed API would be used.

```ts
// brief example
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you tried or considered (including why they are less suitable).

## Compatibility

Would this be a breaking change? If so, describe the migration path or compatibility plan.

## Additional context

Benchmarks, references, or related prior art that help justify the request.
